metadata.description: The name of the existing User Assigned Managed Identity.
The resource group name where the existing UAMI lives.
Reference to an existing User Assigned Managed Identity (UAMI).
Index of the UAMI in `existingUserAssignedIdentities` whose principalId receives the role.
Role definition GUID to grant at Container App scope.
A (UAMI, role definition) pair for granting Container App scoped permissions to an existing UAMI.
The Microsoft Entra principal (object) ID that receives the role.
Role definition GUID to grant at Container App scope.
A (principal, role definition) pair for granting Container App scoped permissions to an existing principal.
The name of the scenario, used to derive resource names
The location for the resource group and Container Apps resources
Tags applied to all resources
Container image to run in the Azure Container App.
Optional startup command override for the container.
Optional startup argument override for the container.
Container CPU allocation (for example, 0.5).
Container memory allocation (for example, 1Gi).
Minimum replica count for the Azure Container App.
Maximum replica count for the Azure Container App.
Ingress target port exposed by the container.
Enable external HTTPS ingress for the Azure Container App.
The SKU name for the Azure Container Registry.
Enable Easy Auth (built-in authentication, Entra ID provider) on the Azure Container App endpoint.
When Easy Auth is enabled, require authentication by redirecting unauthenticated users to login page.
Entra ID App Registration client ID used by Easy Auth. Required when `enableEasyAuth = true`.
Allowed audiences for Easy Auth token validation.
Optional. Existing UAMIs to attach to the Azure Container App and grant roles at Container App scope.
Optional. Existing Microsoft Entra service principal object IDs to grant roles at Container App scope.
Optional. Existing Microsoft Entra user object IDs to grant roles at Container App scope.
Role definition GUIDs assigned to each principal provided in existing* arrays at Container App scope.

variables.uamiRolePairs: [flatten(map(range(0, length(parameters('existingUserAssignedIdentities'))), lambda('uamiIndex', map(parameters('roleDefinitionIds'), lambda('role', createObject('uamiIndex', lambdaVariables('uamiIndex'), 'roleDefinitionGuid', lambdaVariables('role')))))))]
variables.servicePrincipalRolePairs: [flatten(map(parameters('existingServicePrincipalObjectIds'), lambda('pid', map(parameters('roleDefinitionIds'), lambda('role', createObject('principalId', lambdaVariables('pid'), 'roleDefinitionGuid', lambdaVariables('role')))))))]
variables.userRolePairs: [flatten(map(parameters('existingUserObjectIds'), lambda('pid', map(parameters('roleDefinitionIds'), lambda('role', createObject('principalId', lambdaVariables('pid'), 'roleDefinitionGuid', lambdaVariables('role')))))))]

metadata.description: The name of the resource group
The Azure region where the resource group will be created
Tags applied to the resource group
The resource ID of the resource group
The name of the resource group
The location of the resource group
The name of the Log Analytics workspace
The Azure region where the Log Analytics workspace will be created
Tags applied to the Log Analytics workspace
The retention period (days) for workspace data
The resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace
The name of the Log Analytics workspace
The name of the Azure Container Registry (alphanumeric, 5-50).
The Azure region where the Azure Container Registry will be created.
Tags applied to the Azure Container Registry.
The SKU name for the Azure Container Registry.
Enable admin user authentication for the Azure Container Registry. Keep false for Entra ID-first access.
Public network access setting for the Azure Container Registry.
Allow anonymous pull access to the registry.
The resource ID of the Azure Container Registry.
The name of the Azure Container Registry.
The login server endpoint of the Azure Container Registry.
The name of the User Assigned Managed Identity
The Azure region where the User Assigned Managed Identity will be created
Tags applied to the User Assigned Managed Identity
The resource ID of the User Assigned Managed Identity
The name of the User Assigned Managed Identity
The principal ID of the User Assigned Managed Identity (used for role assignments)
The client ID of the User Assigned Managed Identity
The tenant ID of the User Assigned Managed Identity
The name of the Azure Container Apps Environment.
The Azure region where the Azure Container Apps Environment will be created.
Tags applied to the Azure Container Apps Environment.
The Log Analytics workspace customer ID used by Container Apps Environment app logs configuration.
The Log Analytics workspace shared key used by Container Apps Environment app logs configuration.
Enable zone redundancy for the Azure Container Apps Environment.
The resource ID of the Azure Container Apps Environment.
The name of the Azure Container Apps Environment.
The default domain of the Azure Container Apps Environment.
The static IP address of the Azure Container Apps Environment (empty when not allocated).
The name of the Azure Container App.
The Azure region where the Azure Container App will be created.
Tags applied to the Azure Container App.
The resource ID of the Azure Container Apps Environment used by this app.
Resource IDs of User Assigned Managed Identities attached to the Azure Container App.
Enable System Assigned Managed Identity on the Azure Container App.
Container image to run.
Container name inside template.containers.
Optional startup command override for the container.
Optional startup argument override for the container.
Container environment variables. Each element supports { name, value } or { name, secretRef }.
Container CPU allocation as string (for example, 0.5).
Container memory allocation (for example, 1Gi).
Minimum replica count.
Maximum replica count.
Ingress target port exposed by the container.
Enable external ingress for the Azure Container App.
Ingress transport protocol.
Registry connections. Each element: { server, identity }. identity should be a UAMI resource ID.
Secret definitions for the Azure Container App configuration.
Enable Easy Auth (built-in authentication) for the Azure Container App.
When Easy Auth is enabled, require authentication by redirecting unauthenticated users to login page.
Entra ID App Registration client ID used by Easy Auth (required when enableEasyAuth = true).
OpenID issuer for Entra ID. If empty, defaults to login endpoint + tenantId.
Allowed audiences for Easy Auth token validation.

variables.userAssignedIdentities: [reduce(parameters('userAssignedIdentityResourceIds'), createObject(), lambda('acc', 'id', union(lambdaVariables('acc'), createObject(format('{0}', lambdaVariables('id')), createObject()))))]

containerApp.name: [parameters('name')]
containerApp.identity: [if(equals(variables('identityType'), 'None'), null(), createObject('type', variables('identityType'), 'userAssignedIdentities', if(contains(variables('identityType'), 'UserAssigned'), variables('userAssignedIdentities'), null())))]

metadata.description: The resource ID of the Azure Container App.
The name of the Azure Container App.
The FQDN of the Azure Container App ingress endpoint (empty when ingress is disabled).
The latest revision name of the Azure Container App.
The principal ID of the System Assigned Managed Identity (empty when not enabled).
Kind of the resource that the role is scoped to (legacy parameter; prefer target*Name parameters).
Name of the target resource (legacy parameter paired with targetKind; prefer target*Name parameters).
Name of the target Cognitive Services account scope.
Name of the target Storage account scope.
Name of the target Container Registry scope.
Name of the target Container App scope.
Principal (object) ID that receives the role assignment.
Fully qualified role definition resource ID.
Principal type for the role assignment.
The resource ID of the role assignment.

id.value: [if(variables('isStorage'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('roleAssignmentScopeName')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), if(variables('isCognitiveServices'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', variables('roleAssignmentScopeName')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), if(variables('isRegistry'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', variables('roleAssignmentScopeName')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.App/containerApps', variables('roleAssignmentScopeName')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')))))]

metadata.description: The name (GUID) of the role assignment.
